purpose: Images drop onto screen one-by-one as polaroid photo cards with handwritten captions. Supports 1–6 photos. Best for evidence boards, case files, personal profiles, recovered photos.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title displayed at top after all photos drop in. Example: 'Recovered Evidence'
fields.BACKGROUND_COLOR: Background color. Use a dark muted tone. Example: #1a1a2e or #2d1b1b
fields.IMAGE_URL_1: URL to first uploaded photo. Leave as IMAGE_URL_1 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_2: URL to second uploaded photo. Leave as IMAGE_URL_2 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_3: URL to third uploaded photo. Leave as IMAGE_URL_3 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_4: URL to fourth uploaded photo. Leave as IMAGE_URL_4 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_5: URL to fifth uploaded photo. Leave as IMAGE_URL_5 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_6: URL to sixth uploaded photo. Leave as IMAGE_URL_6 if not yet uploaded.
fields.CAPTION_1: Handwritten-style caption below first polaroid. Short, max 4 words. Example: 'Suspect - Jan 12'
fields.SUGGESTION_1: Describe exactly what photo the user should upload for slot 1. Be specific. Example: 'Upload a close-up photo of the recovered item or evidence'
fields.SUGGESTION_2: Describe what to upload for slot 2. Example: 'Upload a photo of the second suspect or location'
fields.SUGGESTION_3: Describe what to upload for slot 3. Leave blank if only 2 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_4: Describe what to upload for slot 4. Leave blank if fewer than 4 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_5: Describe what to upload for slot 5. Leave blank if fewer than 5 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_6: Describe what to upload for slot 6. Leave blank if fewer than 6 images are needed.
